construct_verdict_reason: All three items measure respondents' evaluations of older adults' circumstances in Mexico—past trends, future prospects, and societal recognition—which directly align with the construct's focus on assessment of wellbeing, social conditions, and salience of their problems.

items.reason: Directly measures perceived trend in older adults' general situation over time (2010–present), a core component of evaluating their current conditions and quality of life.
Directly measures respondent's evaluation of future trajectory of older adults' situation, capturing forward-looking assessment of their wellbeing and social conditions.
Directly measures perceived societal salience and consideration of older adults' problems, reflecting how much their issues are recognized and valued in society.
